productDisplayName: ID Men Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Fashioned for the urban youth's appeal and crafted from India's finest materials this high-top id shoe is street styled with a contemporary vs classic aesthetic. Replete with a go-anywhere appeal, these shoes reference the all-American Sports style. Wear these with a tonal sweater and chinos or your favourite denims and a bright tee. Upper High-top canvas upper with the brand slogan printed on the side Contrast stitch detailing Central lace-ups Rubber toe box for abrasion free comfort Canvas tongue and fabric lining Midsole PU midsole with reinforced textured foxing on the toe box Outsole Branding and honeycomb patterned grooves on the TPU outsole Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
